name: Nexalin Technology Inc. Common Stock
summary: Nexalin Technology, Inc. is a medical device company pioneering innovative neurostimulation technologies to treat mental health disorders. Headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, Nexalin develops and markets non-invasive devices to treat anxiety, depression, and insomnia. The company's devices use bio-electronic medical technology to modulate neural activity in the brain to improve mental wellness.
